codeReview.summary: The fix closes the create_return_id scrutiny gap by intentionally guarding Store+Sensitive models while leaving plain Store behavior intact, with explicit integration coverage for both branches.

sharedStateObservations.observation: GitNexus detect_changes fallback behavior remains undocumented even though the worker had to use git diff/git status because the installed CLI lacks that subcommand.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: sensitive-create-return-id-guard handoff verification records npx gitnexus detect_changes --scope all --repo appdb failing with unknown command detect_changes, then uses git diff and git status for scope verification.

summary: Pass: compared against the original failed feature review, this fix adds the missing guard and targeted test coverage so create_return_id is no longer an uncovered Store + Sensitive API path. Plain Store create_return_id behavior is preserved and the sensitive path now fails clearly before persistence.
